tr.td: Alendronic acid (as alendronate sodium) 10 mg oral tablet
Acetaminophen 325 mg and oxycodone hydrochloride 10 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (acetaminophen 325 mg and oxycodone hydrochloride 10 mg) orally every 6 hours as needed for pain
Hydrocodone bitartrate 10 mg and ibuprofen 200 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (10 mg/200 mg) by mouth every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain
Vitamin B12 and/or vitamin B12 derivative-containing product
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (75 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms (1 spray) under the tongue as needed for chest pain, repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (220 mg) by mouth every 12 hours as needed
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Development of individualized plan of care

ul.li: Reduce pain in the hip to improve mobility and quality of life
Increase range of motion in the affected hip
Increase ability to walk without significant pain

tr.td: Vaccine product containing only Influenza virus antigen (medicinal product)
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
